items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Barring a few of these players signing extensions vs new contracts, here are our 2026 free agent counts:

183 Total Free Agents (33.8% of the league)
154 Unrestricted Free Agents*
29 Restricted Free Agents*

*Numbers could change if there is late news on qualifying offers.
